name: dispatch-module-structure
description: dispatch module structure: briefing.ts (context assembler), workflow-selector.ts (explicit > appliesTo > default), dispatcher.ts (stateless read-decide-write), plan-executor.ts (findReadyStep + executeNextStep with AgentRuntime interface). All 4 files under packages/core/src/dispatch/.

content: Workflow selection priority: 1) explicit workflowTemplateId in workItem.context, 2) appliesTo matching on work item status, 3) default wf_simple-task, 4) first available. Implemented in selectWorkflow().
